items.label: Summarize git diff
items.prompt: Give me a 3-bullet summary of the current uncommitted git diff.

items.label: Run tests
items.prompt: Find and run this project's test suite. Report pass/fail counts only.

items.label: Explain this repo
items.prompt: In 4 sentences, explain what this repository does and its main entry points.

items.label: Fix lint errors
items.prompt: Find and fix any linter or compiler errors in the project. Keep changes minimal.

items.label: Commit & describe
items.prompt: Stage all changes and write a concise conventional-commit message. Show me the message before committing.
